parameters.query: SELECT * FROM outside_deposit_orders ORDER BY created_at DESC;
SELECT * FROM outside_deposit_items WHERE order_id = {{ $json.body.order_id }} ORDER BY item_id;

INSERT INTO outside_deposit_orders (doc_no, customer_name, customer_phone, license_plate, job_no, technician, model_name, parking_status, status, created_by, branch) VALUES ('{{ $json.doc_no }}', '{{ $json.customer_name }}', '{{ $json.customer_phone }}', '{{ $json.license_plate }}', '{{ $json.job_no }}', '{{ $json.technician }}', '{{ $json.model_name }}', '{{ $json.parking_status }}', '{{ $json.status }}', '{{ $json.created_by }}', '{{ $json.branch }}') RETURNING order_id, doc_no;

parameters.functionCode: return [{ json: { success: true, ok: true, status: 'ok', order_id: $items()[0]?.json?.order_id, doc_no: $items()[0]?.json?.doc_no } }];
